title: HEK293 passaging schedule
description: Adherent HEK293 maintenance in DMEM + 10% FBS with a 1:6 split every 3 days.

payload.description: Routine maintenance of adherent HEK293 cells. Split at ~80-90% confluence, roughly every 3 days. Trypsinize, quench, count, and reseed at the target ratio.

cell_line.name: HEK293
cell_line.notes: Grow at 37 C, 5% CO2. Do not let exceed 90% confluence between passages.

planned_events.notes: Seed day. Trypsinize with 0.05% trypsin-EDTA 3 min at 37 C, quench with complete medium, reseed 1:6 into a fresh T75.
Confirm even attachment and no contamination.
